description: Bug report that is a known duplicate. Should flag status:blocked (closed by dup) rather than ready.

issue.title: [Bug] pnpm install fails on Node 22.13
issue.body: When I run `pnpm install` on Node 22.13.0 I get `ERR_PNPM_PEER_DEP_ISSUES` for `ai@7.0.0-beta.178` — same as #22. Just adding another data point: confirmed on macOS 14.4 and Linux 6.1.

expected.rationale: Duplicate of #22 — close in favor of the canonical issue
